summary: As of 2026-05-20, MSTR is trading at a discount to the Bitcoin-backed NAV proxy, with premium to NAV at -0.30% and mNAV at 1.00x. Over the last 30 observations, the premium has widened by 16.07%, compared with an average premium of 0.38%. During the same window, BTC moved 7.93% while MSTR moved 28.67%.
